name: Appetizer Egg Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound pork, boneless, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cabbage.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Saute the pork, onion, and shredded cabbage until lightly browned. Stir in the mushrooms, sprouts, currants, and almonds; saute for 1 minute.
4. Dissolve cornstarch in 2 tablespoons water, then combine with sherry, soy sauce, and ginger. Add to the pork mixture and bring to a boil, stirring. Remove from heat and let cool.
5. Fold egg roll wrappers in half to form rectangles. Place a heaping teaspoon of filling on one end of each rectangle. Moisten the long edges, fold over the filling, and seal.
6. Refrigerate egg rolls for several hours or overnight, or freeze until ready to fry.
7. Heat oil to 375°F (190°C). Fry egg rolls in batches until golden brown and crisp on all sides, about 4-5 minutes. Turn once.
8. Drain on paper towels and keep warm while frying the remaining rolls.
Ginger Apricot Sauce:
1/4 cup dried apricots (about 10 pieces)
1/4 cup sugar
1 teaspoon ginger
1/4 teaspoon salt
1 tablespoon lemon juice
Combine all ingredients in a small saucepan, bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 5 minutes. Pour mixture into a blender or food processor, add lemon juice, cover, and process until smooth. Serve warm.
